visa_types.processing_time:
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The appointment system allows applicants wishing to apply for a Student visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta. Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process. It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience 
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter. No handwritten application submission allowed.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The appointment system allows applicants wishing to apply for a Student visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta. Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process. It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience 
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter. No handwritten application submission allowed.

## Visa Fees
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer below grid for all applicable charges. 
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website with Credit card and the VFS service fee at the application center.
Payments at VFS Center will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable VFS fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. For the purpose of keeping track of currency fluctuations the fee in RSD will be updated every two weeks
- The visa fee is non-refundable

[Table:   Study]

## Documents Required
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements - D visa (in person)
Declaration of proof  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bstcgSzGofeFpwpSEQsx0/71d68d513b1b171defa438d7a1b28754/DECLARATION-OF-PROOF.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use plain light-White background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one. 
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
Resolution
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with. 
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Application Form

Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
No handwritten application submission allowed.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
No handwritten application submission allowed.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## VISA FEES
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6HBIQUUjsr8ZVUkFpOAKmY/fe0fffda012feea0b8e3045a901f6f04/visa-fees-others.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website with Credit card and the VFS service fee at the application center.
Payments at VFS Center will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable VFS fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. For the purpose of keeping track of currency fluctuations the fee in RSD will be updated every two weeks
- The visa fee is non-refundable

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR ADOPTION VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5crbFcmL1v4on2oVI9Xz9p/3c3919dec0328c21e98fa8b731d8e3d9/Documentation-required-for-adoption-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR BUSINESS VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7t3NmDGznsyipPBdLFuu50/49b8c9d2d251352fe22b4d2bf53dd731/Documentation-required-for-business-visas-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CITIZENSHIP/RESIDENCE PROGRAMMES (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2aeuO6mWzdIn5RquqvVvez/c39582756db5a4703e1067247c2721eb/Documentation-required-for-citizenship-residence-programmes-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR COURT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4bAGqx2GUFHrJDtThN7aSs/53fb934f9bb6381de2b6c8d27272948a/Documentation-required-for-court-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CULTURAL VISIT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/75y5RAytmH0SP8hHt4Hr9Q/7c486f518c411c71f1a94cff7a7ca6e7/Documentation-required-for-cultural-visit-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT ACTIVITIES VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT TRIALS VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR FAMILY MEMBERS (SPOUSE – WIFE/HUSBAND/REGISTERED PARTNER)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LONG TERM NON-TOURISM (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Ig9pPSYeF49AMhvNQxaRX/34a07b9897d9d8fdba174445104d953e/Documentation-required-for-long-term-non-tourism-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR TRAINING VISIT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/HjsqgnRErY88o6XMqXOpo/fc2c308b2f57c03a8530a433f0ba9e22/Documentation-required-for-training-visit-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR HUMANITARIAN VISA
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR MEDICAL VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bUUcOUgosbyJGRrL851jA/53fae7db53083bb0aa17851999bb420a/Documentation-required-for-medical-visas-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR OFFICIAL/POLITICAL VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/27pKxRNS3PhWJHE7nxE7Kl/ce574c4fc1dfb85e03da754529475d79/Documentation-required-for-offical-political-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR RELIGIOUS VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gKWxFAJ67GSD78Bziy624/402db164bc029f4356c6dfbbc26abb07/Documentation-required-for-religious-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/53c0Jq71zJMTZHEL4M3Sfc/e49d0e24f63b1c96fbcdeac8e69178ff/Documentation-required-for-scientific-research-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR DIPLOMATIC VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/QRiroJaYLkZL0JKcP9qR4/abd1b6b153c2898c9c005fdf6d42f1bc/Documentation-required-for-diplomatic-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LOST DOCUMENTS TO RE-ENTER MALTA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mDyxvZlfHRAxM9lfRAq4d/1295c9acadcf94f82edd51143b0f76ac/Documentation-required-Lost-Documents-to-re-enter-Malta-new.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use plain light-White background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one. 
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
Resolution
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with. 
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
Declaration of Proof Form (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/serbia/english/pdf/Declaration_of_Proof_Form_160226.pdf) 
Click here for the Visa application form

visa_types.name: Long Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
A national “D” visa allows you to enter Malta in order to apply for a residence permit. It can be issued for a set of reasons (i.e. work, studies, training, etc.) and has a long-stay validity for a maximum of one year. Holders of national visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Long Stay Visa categories

Work permit

Student

Family Reunification

Please Note: The Malta embassy will not accept National D-Visa applications for non- resident on the 20 April 2020 until 02 May 2020
visa_types.full_text:
A national “D” visa allows you to enter Malta in order to apply for a residence permit. It can be issued for a set of reasons (i.e. work, studies, training, etc.) and has a long-stay validity for a maximum of one year. Holders of national visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Long Stay Visa categories

Work permit

Student

Family Reunification

Please Note: The Malta embassy will not accept National D-Visa applications for non- resident on the 20 April 2020 until 02 May 2020

visa_types.name: Family reunification
visa_types.documents_required:
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements - D visa (in person) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/e13968843f01539ed23ba05f11fa7c6b/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)

Declaration of proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2vYsQJ56ecOy3Bprf2vSuv/30c8b807aee5a4e411925a2e1c72dcd8/declaration-of-proof.pdf)

## Overview

Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
No handwritten application submission allowed.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Visa Fees
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer below grid for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website with Credit card and the VFS service fee at the application center.
Payments at VFS Center will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable VFS fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. For the purpose of keeping track of currency fluctuations the fee in RSD will be updated every two weeks
- The visa fee is non-refundable

[Table:   Family reunification]

## Documents Required
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements - D visa (in person) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/e13968843f01539ed23ba05f11fa7c6b/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)
Visa Requirements - Spouse, children related to EU (more than 90) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/10TkHRXIqXhxcnl3ixQKu4/26e753acb737fa53729d7210616d98c2/List-of-Required-Documents-Spouse_Children_related_to_EU_more-than-90_.pdf)
Declaration of proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2vYsQJ56ecOy3Bprf2vSuv/30c8b807aee5a4e411925a2e1c72dcd8/declaration-of-proof.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use plain light-White background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one. 
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
Resolution
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with. 
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Application Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Persons applying for employment in Malta require a Serbian residential permit with a validity of a minimum of 6 weeks from date of application. Holders of employment visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
No handwritten application submission allowed.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Persons applying for employment in Malta require a Serbian residential permit with a validity of a minimum of 6 weeks from date of application. Holders of employment visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
No handwritten application submission allowed.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Visa Fees
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer below grid for all applicable charges. 
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website with Credit card and the VFS service fee at the application center.
Payments at VFS Center will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable VFS fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. For the purpose of keeping track of currency fluctuations the fee in RSD will be updated every two weeks
- The visa fee is non-refundable

[Table:   Work permit]

## Documents Required
Please ensure all the documents are submitted in English as per the below checklist:
Documentation required for Employment in Malta
Documentation required for Temporary Employment in Malta (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/serbia/english/pdf/Documentation%20required%20for%20Temporary%20Employment%20in%20Malta_serbia.pdf)
Declaration of proof  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bstcgSzGofeFpwpSEQsx0/71d68d513b1b171defa438d7a1b28754/DECLARATION-OF-PROOF.pdf)

The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).

- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.

- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.

The photo for each visa applicant must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one. 
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
Resolution
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with. 
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.
